item.name: Panoptes
item.description:
The myriad dots that resemble eyes are said to confuse certain predators. This only works, however, if said predator actually cares whether it has been seen.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: The plethora of white spots on this ray's back appear as a host of unblinking eyes─an illusion so beguiling that superstitious sailors once spread rumors of a ghostly, aquatic voidsent.
